text: Ben Warner said Gartner described the category as a solution for simulating synthetic human populations and predicting human attitudes and behaviours.
Electric Twin sits on top of News UK's first-party data infrastructure and generates synthetic versions of the audience, according to the user's read of the Warner post and Times deal.

The same surface logic appears across No. 10 population-level policy modeling, News UK synthetic audience substitution, and Gartner category formation: modeled population replaces consulted population.
